evals.prompt: Tenemos un incidente en producción. Acá está el link de Datadog que mandó el equipo de guardia: https://app.datadoghq.com/logs?query=service%3Ams-payments+status%3Aerror&from_ts=now-1h&to_ts=now — podés traerme el resumen de qué está pasando?
evals.expected_output: Claude should use 'zammadog from-url' with the provided URL, explain the command it's running, and interpret the output (or explain the auth requirements if keys are missing). Should NOT try to open a browser or use curl manually.

assertions.name: uses_from_url_command
assertions.description: Uses 'zammadog from-url' with the exact URL provided

assertions.name: does_not_use_curl_or_browser
assertions.description: Does not try to use curl, wget, or browser to fetch the Datadog URL directly

assertions.name: explains_auth_if_missing
assertions.description: If DD_API_KEY/DD_APP_KEY not set, explains what to export rather than failing silently

evals.prompt: Necesito saber cuántos errores está tirando cada servicio en los últimos 30 minutos en Datadog. Tengo las credenciales seteadas en el ambiente.
evals.expected_output: Claude should use 'zammadog logs aggregate' with --group-by 'service,status' and --from now-30m. Should show the command clearly and explain what the output means.

assertions.name: uses_logs_aggregate
assertions.description: Uses 'zammadog logs aggregate' subcommand (not logs search)

assertions.name: includes_group_by_service_status
assertions.description: Includes --group-by with service and status facets

evals.prompt: Tengo este trace ID de un error que reportó un usuario: abc123def456789. El servicio es ms-orders y fue hace unos 20 minutos. Quiero ver todos los spans de ese trace.
evals.expected_output: Claude should use 'zammadog apm search --query trace_id:abc123def456789' with appropriate time range. Should explain the command and how to interpret the spans table.

assertions.name: sets_appropriate_time_window
assertions.description: Sets --from to cover the last ~20-30 minutes (not default 1h is fine too, but not wider than 1h)

assertions.name: sets_limit_to_50
assertions.description: Sets --limit 50 (max) since we want ALL spans of a trace
